class.name: SpinePhysicsConstraintData
class.brief_description: Stores the setup pose for a PhysicsConstraint.
class.description:
Stores the setup pose data for a physics constraint, which determines how physics simulation is configured for a bone.
See [url=https://esotericsoftware.com/spine-physics-constraints]Physics constraints[/url] in the Spine User Guide.

method.name: get_bone
method.description: Returns the bone constrained by this physics constraint.

method.name: get_x
method.description: Returns the X offset for the physics constraint.

method.name: get_y
method.description: Returns the Y offset for the physics constraint.

method.name: get_rotate
method.description: Returns the rotation offset for the physics constraint.

method.name: get_scale_x
method.description: Returns the X scale for the physics constraint.

method.name: get_shear_x
method.description: Returns the X shear for the physics constraint.

method.name: get_limit
method.description: Returns the limit for the physics constraint.

method.name: get_step
method.description: Returns the step value for the physics simulation.

method.name: is_inertia_global
method.description: Returns whether inertia is applied globally.

method.name: is_strength_global
method.description: Returns whether strength is applied globally.

method.name: is_damping_global
method.description: Returns whether damping is applied globally.

method.name: is_mass_global
method.description: Returns whether mass is applied globally.

method.name: is_wind_global
method.description: Returns whether wind is applied globally.

method.name: is_gravity_global
method.description: Returns whether gravity is applied globally.

method.name: is_mix_global
method.description: Returns whether mix is applied globally.

method.name: get_setup_pose
method.description: Returns the setup pose for this physics constraint data.
